title: IndustrialRevolution-mahiro76
description: The Industrial Revolution mod, written by mahiro76, is still in the early stages of development, and the update progress is relatively slow.
body:
Industrial Revolution is a Minecraft mod developed by mahiro76 that introduces a brand new industrial system to the game. This mod aims to enrich your gameplay experience by adding a variety of industrial-themed items, blocks, and mechanics.

**Notice:**  
This mod is in early development. It may be unstable or cause crashes due to incomplete code. Features and mechanics are subject to change. Please report issues or suggestions via GitHub Issues.

**Features:**  
- New items such as the Crutch and Hardener, each with unique properties and uses  
- Organized item groups for better inventory management: Fight, Material, Natural Block, Tool, and Food  
- Enhanced tooltips with colored text for improved readability and information

**Version Support:**  
- Support for Minecraft 1.21.1 is temporarily suspended. Please use supported versions listed on the releases page.

**Multi-language:**  
- Supports multiple languages. You can switch the language in Minecraft's settings.

**License:**  
This project is licensed under the MIT License with additional non-commercial and source-only distribution clauses. See the LICENSE file for details.
